input.prompt:
Explore this website project to understand its structure, purpose, and current state. Look at:
1. The overall project structure (top-level files and directories)
2. Any package.json or config files for tech stack info
3. Key source files (pages, components, layouts)
4. Any README or docs
5. Styling approach
6. Routing structure

Give me a comprehensive overview of what this website is, what tech stack it uses, and what pages/features it currently has. Be thorough but concise.

content.text:
Here is a comprehensive overview of the project:

---

## Project Overview: VOID -- Design Collective

**Type:** Single-page static website (landing/portfolio page)
**Single file:** `/home/sardorchikdev/monochrome-ads/index.html` -- the entire project is one file with embedded CSS and JavaScript. No build system, no package.json, no framework.

### Tech Stack
- **Pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript** -- zero dependencies, zero build tooling
- **Fonts:** Space Grotesk and Space Mono from Google Fonts
- **No framework** -- no React, no Vue, no Next.js. Vanilla DOM manipulation.

### Design Philosophy
A stark monochrome aesthetic (black and white only, as the repo name "monochrome-ads" suggests). The design is built around brutalist/minimalist principles: sharp corners (all `border-radius: 0`), heavy typography, grid-based layouts, and a dark default theme with light mode toggle.

### Sections / Pages (all on one scrollable page)

1. **Navigation** -- Fixed top bar with logo "VOID", anchor links, and a dark/light theme toggle button.
2. **Hero** -- Full-viewport section with title "Define Your Void", tagline, CTA button ("Enter The Void"), and a decorative animated grid overlay.
3. **Statement** -- Inverted color section displaying the manifesto quote: "We do not add. We subtract -- until only truth remains."
4. **Marquee** -- Infinite horizontal scrolling ticker with keywords: Design, Subtract, Refine, Reduce, Distill, Essence.
5. **Stats** -- 4-column grid showing animated counters (47 Projects, 3 Awards, 12 Members, 99% Reduction).
6. **Principles** (id: `#principles`) -- 6 design principles in a grid: Embrace Void, Sharp Truth, Monochrome, System, Timeless, Less.
7. **Selected Work** (id: `#work`) -- 4 project cards (Black Mirror, Silent Archive, Zero One, Form & Field) with hover preview effects.
8. **Gallery** -- 2x2 grid of geometric CSS patterns (Lines, Angles, Patterns, Rhythm).
9. **Team** (id: `#team`) -- 4 team member cards with portrait placeholders: Arina Kozlov (Creative Director), Max Brecht (Systems Lead), Lena Nordin (Typography), Dario Vasari (Motion & Code).
10. **History** (id: `#history`) -- Timeline from 2019-2024 covering founding, first commission, publication, and digital launch.
11. **Footer** (id: `#contact`) -- 3-column footer with branding, navigation links, and contact/social links (email, Twitter, Instagram, Are.na).

### Interactive Features
- **Custom cursor** -- small dot + larger follower ring with `mix-blend-mode: difference`, expands on hover
- **Film grain overlay** -- Canvas-based animated noise texture rendered every frame
- **Scanlines** -- CSS-based CRT scanline effect, activated when switching to light mode
- **Scroll reveal animations** -- Elements fade/slide in via IntersectionObserver-style scroll position checks
- **Counting animation** -- Stat numbers count up with cubic easing when scrolled into view
- **Theme toggle** -- Dark/light mode via `data-theme` attribute on `<html>`, toggles scanlines on in light mode
- **Page transition** -- Full-screen wipe animation on nav link clicks
- **Parallax effects** -- Hero title moves with mouse position; quote marks and grid overlay shift on scroll
- **Hover sound effects** -- Web Audio API oscillator-based hover and click sounds (initialized on first user click)
- **Grid cell animation** -- Decorative hero grid cells toggle "active" state every 2 seconds
- **Full responsive design** -- Grids collapse on mobile (<768px), custom cursor disabled

### Current State
The site is complete as a single-page portfolio/landing page. It is fully self-contained in one HTML file. It has no server-side logic, no API integrations, and no form handling. The portrait placeholders use initials instead of actual photos, and the work previews use CSS grid patterns instead of project screenshots.

file.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="dark">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>VOID — Design Collective</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');

  :root {
    --black: #000;
    --white: #fff;
    --gray-100: #f5f5f5;
    --gray-200: #e0e0e0;
    --gray-300: #b0b0b0;
    --gray-400: #808080;
    --gray-500: #505050;
    --gray-600: #303030;
    --gray-700: #1a1a1a;
    --gray-800: #0a0a0a;
    --bg: var(--black);
    --fg: var(--white);
    --fg-dim: var(--gray-300);
    --fg-muted: var(--gray-400);
    --border: var(--gray-700);
    --border-subtle: var(--gray-800);
  }

  [data-theme="light"] {
    --bg: var(--white);
    --fg: var(--black);
    --fg-dim: var(--gray-600);
    --fg-muted: var(--gray-500);
    --border: var(--gray-200);
    --border-subtle: var(--gray-100);
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; border-radius: 0; }

  html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
  }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    cursor: none;
    transition: background 0.6s ease, color 0.6s ease;
  }

  /* ============================================
     CUSTOM CURSOR SYSTEM
   ============================================ */
  .cursor-main {
    position: fixed;
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    background: var(--fg);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: width 0.2s, height 0.2s, border-radius 0.1s;
  }
  .cursor-main.hovering {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
  }

  .cursor-follower {
    position: fixed;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border: 1px solid var(--fg);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  .cursor-follower.hovering {
    width: 80px;
    height: 80px;
    opacity: 0.3;
  }

  /* ============================================
     GRAIN OVERLAY
   ============================================ */
  .grain-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9990;
    opacity: 0.04;
    mixture: blend-mode: multiply;
  }
  .grain-overlay canvas {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
  }

  .scanlines {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9989;
    opacity: 0;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      0deg,
      transparent 0px,
      transparent 2px,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 2px,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 4px
    );
    transition: opacity 0.6s;
  }
  .scanlines.visible {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  /* ============================================
     PAGE TRANSITION
   ============================================ */
  .page-transition {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: var(--fg);
    z-index: 10000;
    transform: translateY(100%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .page-transition.wiping {
    animation: pageWipe 0.8s ease-in-out;
  }
  @keyframes pageWipe {
    0% { transform: translateY(100%); }
    40% { transform: translateY(0%); }
    60% { transform: translateY(0%); }
    100% { transform: translateY(-100%); }
  }

  /* ============================================
     NAVIGATION
   ============================================ */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px 40px;
    z-index: 200;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg);
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
    cursor: none;
  }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 8px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  .nav-right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 32px;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 32px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -4px;
    left: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--fg);
    transition: width 0.3s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--fg); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

  .theme-toggle {
    background: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--fg);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .theme-toggle:hover {
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     SCROLL ANIMATIONS
   ============================================ */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(40px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
  .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
  .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
  .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }
  .reveal-delay-4 { transition-delay: 0.4s; }

  .reveal-left {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(-60px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal-left.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .reveal-right {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(60px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal-right.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .reveal-scale {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.9);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal-scale.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }

  /* ============================================
     HERO SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 120px 80px;
    position: relative;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-tag {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .hero-tag::before {
    content: '';
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  .hero-title-wrap {
    position: relative;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(60px, 10vw, 140px);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 0.9;
    letter-spacing: -4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    max-width: 900px;
    color: var(--fg);
  }
  .hero-title .outline {
    color: var(--bg);
    -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--fg);
    text-stroke: 2px var(--fg);
  }

  .kinetic-letter {
    display: inline-block;
    transition: transform 0.15s ease;
    will-change: transform;
  }

  .hero-desc {
    max-width: 420px;
    margin-top: 48px;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .hero-cta {
    margin-top: 56px;
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 16px 48px;
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 700;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    border: 2px solid var(--fg);
  }
  .hero-cta:hover {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  /* DECORATIVE GRID */
  .grid-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    right: 80px;
    bottom: 80px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 60px);
    grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 60px);
    gap: 1px;
  }
  .grid-cell {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg);
    transition: background 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;
  }
  .grid-cell.active {
    background: var(--fg);
  }
  .grid-cell:hover {
    border-color: var(--fg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     VERTICAL TEXT ELEMENT
   ============================================ */
  .vertical-text {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  .vertical-text.left {
    left: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: rotate(-90deg);
    transform-origin: 0 0;
  }
  .vertical-text.right {
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
    transform-origin: 0 0;
  }

  /* ============================================
     STATEMENT SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .statement {
    padding: 160px 80px;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  .statement-text {
    font-size: clamp(32px, 6vw, 80px);
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1.05;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    max-width: 1000px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
    color: inherit;
  }

  .statement-author {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-top: 64px;
  }

  .quote-marks {
    font-size: 120px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    left: 80px;
    color: var(--fg);
    opacity: 0.1;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  /* ============================================
     MARQUEE
   ============================================ */
  .marquee-section {
    padding: 40px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .marquee {
    display: flex;
    gap: 48px;
    animation: marquee 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes marquee {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  .marquee-item {
    font-size: 72px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    color: var(--border);
  }
  .marquee-item .dot {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    background: var(--fg);
    margin: 0 32px;
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  /* ============================================
     STATS
   ============================================ */
  .stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    background: var(--bg);
  }

  .stat {
    padding: 64px 48px;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
    text-align: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .stat:hover { background: var(--gray-700); }
  [data-theme="light"] .stat:hover { background: var(--gray-100); }

  .stat-value {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 56px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  /* ============================================
     SECTION COMMON
   ============================================ */
  .section {
    padding: 80px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .section-header {
    margin-bottom: 64px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 64px);
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
  }

  .section-count {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     FEATURES
   ============================================ */
  .features {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .feature {
    padding: 48px;
    background: var(--bg);
    transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .feature::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: var(--fg);
    transform: translateY(100%);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    z-index: 0;
  }
  .feature:hover::before {
    transform: translateY(0%);
  }
  .feature:hover {
    color: var(--bg);
  }
  .feature > * {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .feature-number {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 72px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--border);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .feature:hover .feature-number {
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  .feature-title {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .feature-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    font-weight: 300;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .feature:hover .feature-desc {
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     WORK/PROJECTS SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .work-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .work-item {
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    background: var(--bg);
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 32px;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .work-item:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .work-preview {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 32px;
    bottom: 100px;
    overflow: hidden;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
  }
  .work-item:hover .work-preview { opacity: 1; }

  .work-preview-inner {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--gray-600);
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  [data-theme="light"] .work-preview-inner { background: var(--gray-100); }

  .work-preview-grid {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-size: 20px 20px;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(to right, var(--bg) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--bg) 1px, transparent 1px);
    opacity: 0.2;
  }

  .work-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .work-title {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
  }

  .work-tag {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-top: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .work-num {
    position: absolute;
    top: 32px;
    right: 32px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 64px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--border);
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .work-item:hover .work-num { color: var(--fg); }

  /* ============================================
     GALLERY
   ============================================ */
  .gallery {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .gallery-item {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    background: var(--bg);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .gallery-pattern {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-pattern { opacity: 0.3; }

  .gallery-item:nth-child(1) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 12px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(2) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 8px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(3) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-conic-gradient(var(--fg) 0% 25%, transparent 25% 50%) 0 0 / 30px 30px;
    opacity: 0.1;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(4) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 6px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }

  .gallery-label {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    background: var(--bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--fg);
    color: var(--fg);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-label {
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     TEAM SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .team-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .team-member {
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 40px 32px;
    text-align: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .team-member:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .team-portrait {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .portrait-placeholder {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--gray-700);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--fg);
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
  [data-theme="light"] .portrait-placeholder { background: var(--gray-100); opacity: 0.5; }
  .team-member:hover .portrait-placeholder { transform: scale(1.05); }

  .team-name {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .team-role {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  /* ============================================
     TIMELINE
   ============================================ */
  .timeline {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 80px;
  }

  .timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .timeline-item {
    position: relative;
    padding: 48px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .timeline-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .timeline-item::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: -84px;
    top: 56px;
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    background: var(--fg);
    transition: transform 0.2s;
  }
  .timeline-item:hover::before {
    transform: scale(1.5);
  }

  .timeline-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .timeline-title {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .timeline-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    line-height: 1.6;
    max-width: 600px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     FOOTER
   ============================================ */
  footer {
    padding: 80px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 64px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative;
  }

  .footer-brand {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 24px;
    letter-spacing: 8px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .footer-copy {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .footer-col-title {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .footer-links {
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .footer-links a {
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--fg); }

  /* ============================================
     RESPONSIVE
   ============================================ */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero { padding: 120px 24px; }
    .section { padding: 64px 24px; }
    .features { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .gallery { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .work-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .team-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    footer { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 48px 24px; }
    nav { padding: 16px 24px; }
    .cursor-main, .cursor-follower { display: none; }
    body { cursor: auto; }
    .statement { padding: 80px 24px; }
    .statement-text { font-size: 36px; }
  }
</style>
</head>

    <div class="section-label">Principles</div>
    <div class="section-count">III — 06</div>
  </div>
  <div class="features">
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="feature-number">I</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Embrace Void</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Empty space is not absence — it is the most potent form of presence. Use it to create weight, hierarchy, and intention.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="feature-number">II</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Sharp Truth</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Rounded edges soften the message. Sharp geometry cuts through noise and communicates with unfiltered directness.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="feature-number">III</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Monochrome</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Color distracts. Black and white reveal structure. Strip away hue and what remains is pure form and function.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="feature-number">IV</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">System</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Design is not decoration — it is a system of decisions. Every margin, every weight, every rhythm serves the whole.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="feature-number">V</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Timeless</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Trends age. Structure endures. We build systems that survive the death of the moment they were born in.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="feature-number">VI</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Less</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">If you can remove it, you should. The goal is not completion but reduction — to the point where no more can be taken.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
(function() {
  'use strict';

  /* =========================================
     CUSTOM CURSOR
   ========================================= */
  const cursorMain = document.getElementById('cursorMain');
  const cursorFollower = document.getElementById('cursorFollower');
  let mouseX = -100, mouseY = -100;
  let followerX = -100, followerY = -100;

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    mouseX = e.clientX;
    mouseY = e.clientY;
    cursorMain.style.left = mouseX + 'px';
    cursorMain.style.top = mouseY + 'px';
  });

  function updateCursor() {
    // Smooth follow
    followerX += (mouseX - followerX) * 0.12;
    followerY += (mouseY - followerY) * 0.12;
    cursorFollower.style.left = followerX + 'px';
    cursorFollower.style.top = followerY + 'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(updateCursor);
  }
  updateCursor();

  // Hover elements
  const hoverTargets = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, .feature, .work-item, .gallery-item, .team-member, .timeline-item');
  hoverTargets.forEach(function(el) {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
      cursorMain.classList.add('hovering');
      cursorFollower.classList.add('hovering');
    });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
      cursorMain.classList.remove('hovering');
      cursorFollower.classList.remove('hovering');
    });
  });

  /* =========================================
     GRAIN NOISE SYSTEM
   ========================================= */
  const grainCanvas = document.getElementById('grainCanvas');
  const grainCtx = grainCanvas.getContext('2d');

  function resizeGrain() {
    grainCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    grainCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  }
  resizeGrain();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resizeGrain);

  function drawGrain() {
    const w = grainCanvas.width;
    const h = grainCanvas.height;
    const imageData = grainCtx.createImageData(w, h);
    const data = imageData.data;
    for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {
      const v = Math.random() * 255;
      data[i] = v;
      data[i + 1] = v;
      data[i + 2] = v;
      data[i + 3] = 255;
    }
    grainCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
    requestAnimationFrame(drawGrain);
  }
  drawGrain();

  /* =========================================
     AUDIO SYSTEM (Web Audio API)
   ========================================= */
  let audioCtx = null;
  let soundEnabled = false;

  function initAudio() {
    if (audioCtx) return;
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    soundEnabled = true;
  }

  function playHoverSound() {
    if (!audioCtx || !soundEnabled) return;
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc.frequency.value = 200 + Math.random() * 100;
    osc.type = 'sine';
    gain.gain.value = 0.02;
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
  }

  function playClickSound() {
    if (!audioCtx || !soundEnabled) return;
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc.frequency.value = 800;
    osc.type = 'square';
    gain.gain.value = 0.03;
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
  }

  // Enable audio on first interaction
  document.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (!audioCtx) {
      initAudio();
    }
    playClickSound();
  });

  hoverTargets.forEach(function(el) {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', playHoverSound);
  });

  /* =========================================
     SCROLL REVEAL SYSTEM
   ========================================= */
  const revealElements = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-scale');

  function checkReveals() {
    const windowHeight = window.innerHeight;
    revealElements.forEach(function(el) {
      const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const top = rect.top;
      if (top < windowHeight * 0.85) {
        el.classList.add('revealed');
      }
    });
  }

  window.addEventListener('scroll', checkReveals);
  window.addEventListener('resize', checkReveals);

  // Initial check
  setTimeout(checkReveals, 100);

  /* =========================================
     COUNTING ANIMATION
   ========================================= */
  const countElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-count]');
  let counted = false;

  function triggerCount() {
    if (counted) return;
    countElements.forEach(function(el) {
      const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (rect.top < window.innerHeight * 0.85) {
        counted = true;
        const target = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-count'));
        let current = 0;
        const duration = 2000;
        const startTime = performance.now();

        function animateCount(now) {
          const elapsed = now - startTime;
          const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
          // Ease out cubic
          const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
          current = Math.floor(eased * target);
          el.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
          if (progress < 1) {
            requestAnimationFrame(animateCount);
          } else {
            el.textContent = String(target).padStart(2, '0');
          }
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(animateCount);
      }
    });
  }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', triggerCount);
  setTimeout(triggerCount, 100);

  /* =========================================
     KINETIC TYPOGRAPHY
   ========================================= */
  const heroTitle = document.getElementById('heroTitle');
  let heroKinetic = [];

  // Wrap each letter of the hero title in a span
  function setupKineticText() {
    const htmlContent = heroTitle.innerHTML;
    // For simplicity, only process non-outline text
    // We'll add a simple parallax effect via mouse movement instead
  }
  setupKineticText();

  // Parallax on hero title with mouse position
  const heroSection = document.querySelector('.hero');
  heroSection.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    const rect = heroSection.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
    const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
    heroTitle.style.transform = `translate(${x * -8}px, ${y * -8}px)`;
  });

  heroSection.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
    heroTitle.style.transform = 'translate(0, 0)';
    heroTitle.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease';
    setTimeout(function() {
      heroTitle.style.transition = 'none';
    }, 500);
  });

  /* =========================================
     DARK / LIGHT MODE TOGGLE
   ========================================= */
  const themeToggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
  const scanlines = document.getElementById('scanlines');
  const htmlEl = document.documentElement;

  themeToggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    e.stopPropagation(); // prevent double-click audio
    initAudio();
    const isDark = htmlEl.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark';
    if (isDark) {
      htmlEl.setAttribute('data-theme', 'light');
      themeToggle.textContent = 'Dark';
      scanlines.classList.add('visible');
    } else {
      htmlEl.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark');
      themeToggle.textContent = 'Light';
      scanlines.classList.remove('visible');
    }
  });

  /* =========================================
     PAGE TRANSITION
   ========================================= */
  const pageTransition = document.getElementById('pageTransition');

  function triggerPageTransition(callback) {
    pageTransition.classList.add('wiping');
    if (typeof callback === 'function') {
      setTimeout(callback, 400);
    }
    setTimeout(function() {
      pageTransition.classList.remove('wiping');
    }, 800);
  }

  // Apply to nav links
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(function(link) {
    link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        triggerPageTransition(function() {
          const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
          window.scrollTo(0, window.pageYOffset + rect.top);
        });
      }
    });
  });

  /* =========================================
     GRID CELL ANIMATION
   ========================================= */
  const gridCells = document.querySelectorAll('.grid-cell');
  setInterval(function() {
    const randomCell = gridCells[Math.floor(Math.random() * gridCells.length)];
    randomCell.classList.toggle('active');
  }, 2000);

  /* =========================================
     SCROLL-BASED PARALLAX
   ========================================= */
  const quoteMarks = document.querySelector('.quote-marks');
  const gridOverlay = document.querySelector('.grid-overlay');

  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    const scrollY = window.pageYOffset;

    if (quoteMarks) {
      const offset = scrollY * 0.3;
      quoteMarks.style.transform = 'translateY(' + offset + 'px)';
    }

    if (gridOverlay) {
      const offset = scrollY * 0.1;
      gridOverlay.style.transform = 'translateY(' + (offset * -1) + 'px)';
    }
  });

})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

content.text:
Good, I have a clear picture of the site. Here are my ideas for improvement, organized by impact:

## Visual & Interaction

1. **Add a real project detail view** — The work cards hover but clicking doesn't lead anywhere. Even a modal or expanded section with case study details would make this feel like a real portfolio, not just a landing page.

2. **Magnetic cursor / drag interactions** — The custom cursor is nice but could be elevated. Magnetic pull on interactive elements, or a drag-based reveal for project cards would deepen the experience.

3. **Smooth scroll** — `scroll-behavior: smooth` is fine but a proper smooth scroll library (Lenis or Locomotive Scroll) with velocity-based skew would make scrolling feel premium and match the brutalist aesthetic.

4. **Horizontal scroll section** — A horizontal-scrolling work gallery section would break the vertical rhythm and feel more museum-like, which fits the brand.

5. **Animated SVG transitions** — Instead of the simple page wipe, use a custom clip-path animation (like a shape revealing) that aligns with the geometric/brutalist aesthetic.

## Content & Structure

6. **Manifesto / About page** — The site mentions a manifesto but there's no dedicated section beyond the quote. A full-screen text piece would reinforce the brand.

7. **Real imagery for projects** — The CSS grid pattern placeholders in work cards are clever but abstract. Even abstract/project-relevant imagery would make it feel grounded.

8. **Loading / intro animation** — A brief entrance sequence (countdown, logo reveal, text typing) would make the first visit memorable.

9. **Contact form** — Right now the "Contact" link just anchors to a footer with an email address. A minimal contact form or at least a mailto interaction would be more functional.

## Technical

10. **Theme persistence** — The dark/light toggle doesn't use `localStorage` to remember preference across page reloads.

11. **Grain performance** — `drawGrain()` creates a `createImageData` for the full viewport every single frame. On retina displays this is millions of pixels 60fps. Throttling to 30fps or using a small repeating canvas pattern would help.

12. **Scroll reveal with `IntersectionObserver`** — Currently using `getBoundingClientRect()` on every scroll event. `IntersectionObserver` would be cleaner and more performant.

13. **Accessibility** — `cursor: none` hides the cursor entirely, which could be problematic. Adding `aria-labels`, focus states, and keyboard navigation would improve real-world usability.

14. **SEO meta tags** — Missing Open Graph tags, meta description, favicon — important if this ever goes live.

## The "standout" ideas (highest impact)

- **Project detail modals** — would instantly make this feel like a real portfolio
- **Intro/loading animation** — strongest first impression for a design collective
- **Magnetic cursor + micro-interactions** — would elevate the feel without breaking the aesthetic
- **Smooth scroll with inertia** — single biggest UX improvement

Want me to implement any of these?

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="dark">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>VOID — Design Collective</title>

<!-- SEO & Social -->
<meta name="description" content="VOID is a design collective operating at the intersection of art and technology. We believe in the power of constraint — that emptiness has weight, and silence has shape.">
<meta property="og:title" content="VOID — Design Collective">
<meta property="og:description" content="We do not add. We subtract — until only truth remains.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="/og.jpg">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#000">

<!-- Fonts -->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<!-- Favicon (SVG data URI) -->
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><rect width='100' height='100' fill='black'/><text x='50' y='68' font-family='monospace' font-size='50' fill='white' text-anchor='middle'>V</text></svg>">

<style>
  :root {
    --black: #000;
    --white: #fff;
    --gray-100: #f5f5f5;
    --gray-200: #e0e0e0;
    --gray-300: #b0b0b0;
    --gray-400: #808080;
    --gray-500: #505050;
    --gray-600: #303030;
    --gray-700: #1a1a1a;
    --gray-800: #0a0a0a;
    --bg: var(--black);
    --fg: var(--white);
    --fg-dim: var(--gray-300);
    --fg-muted: var(--gray-400);
    --border: var(--gray-700);
    --border-subtle: var(--gray-800);
  }

  [data-theme="light"] {
    --bg: var(--white);
    --fg: var(--black);
    --fg-dim: var(--gray-600);
    --fg-muted: var(--gray-500);
    --border: var(--gray-200);
    --border-subtle: var(--gray-100);
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; border-radius: 0; }

  html {
    scroll-behavior: auto; /* smooth scroll handled by JS */
  }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    cursor: none;
    transition: background 0.6s ease, color 0.6s ease;
  }

  /* ============================================
     LOADING SCREEN
   ============================================ */
  .loader {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: var(--black);
    z-index: 20000;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: opacity 0.6s ease, visibility 0.6s ease;
  }
  .loader.done {
    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
  }
  .loader-logo {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 24px;
    color: var(--white);
    opacity: 0;
    animation: loaderFadeIn 0.8s ease 0.2s forwards;
  }
  .loader-count {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--gray-500);
    margin-top: 24px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: loaderFadeIn 0.4s ease 0.5s forwards;
  }
  .loader-bar {
    width: 200px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gray-700);
    margin-top: 16px;
    position: relative;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: loaderFadeIn 0.4s ease 0.5s forwards;
  }
  .loader-bar-fill {
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    height: 100%;
    width: 0%;
    background: var(--white);
    transition: width 0.1s;
  }
  .loader-tagline {
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--gray-500);
    margin-top: 32px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0;
    max-width: 400px;
    text-align: center;
    animation: loaderFadeIn 0.6s ease 0.8s forwards;
  }

  @keyframes loaderFadeIn {
    to { opacity: 1; }
  }

  /* ============================================
     CUSTOM CURSOR SYSTEM
   ============================================ */
  .cursor-main {
    position: fixed;
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    background: var(--fg);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: width 0.2s, height 0.2s;
  }
  .cursor-main.hovering {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 50%;
  }

  .cursor-follower {
    position: fixed;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border: 1px solid var(--fg);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    opacity: 0.5;
    transition: opacity 0.2s;
  }
  .cursor-follower.hovering {
    width: 64px;
    height: 64px;
    opacity: 0.2;
  }

  /* FOCUS VISIBILITY (accessibility) */
  :focus-visible {
    outline: 2px solid var(--fg);
    outline-offset: 4px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     GRAIN OVERLAY
   ============================================ */
  .grain-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9990;
    opacity: 0.04;
    mix-blend-mode: multiply;
  }

  .scanlines {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9989;
    opacity: 0;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      0deg,
      transparent 0px,
      transparent 2px,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 2px,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 4px
    );
    transition: opacity 0.6s;
  }
  .scanlines.visible {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  /* ============================================
     PAGE TRANSITION (clip-path)
   ============================================ */
  .page-transition {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: var(--fg);
    z-index: 10000;
    clip-path: circle(0% at var(--cx, 50%) var(--cy, 50%));
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: clip-path 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1);
  }
  .page-transition.wiping {
    clip-path: circle(150% at var(--cx, 50%) var(--cy, 50%));
  }
  .page-transition.wiping-out {
    clip-path: circle(150% at var(--cx, 50%) var(--cy, 50%));
    transition: clip-path 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1);
  }
  .page-transition.out {
    clip-path: circle(0% at var(--cx, 50%) var(--cy, 50%));
  }

  /* ============================================
     NAVIGATION
   ============================================ */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px 40px;
    z-index: 200;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg);
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
    cursor: none;
  }

  .logo {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 8px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .nav-right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 32px;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 32px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -4px;
    left: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--fg);
    transition: width 0.3s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--fg); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

  .theme-toggle {
    background: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--fg);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .theme-toggle:hover {
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     SCROLL ANIMATIONS (IntersectionObserver)
   ============================================ */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(40px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
  .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
  .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
  .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }
  .reveal-delay-4 { transition-delay: 0.4s; }

  .reveal-left {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(-60px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal-left.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .reveal-right {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(60px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal-right.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .reveal-scale {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.9);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .reveal-scale.revealed {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }

  /* ============================================
     HERO SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 120px 80px;
    position: relative;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-tag {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .hero-tag::before {
    content: '';
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  .hero-title-wrap {
    position: relative;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(60px, 10vw, 140px);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 0.9;
    letter-spacing: -4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    max-width: 900px;
    color: var(--fg);
  }
  .hero-title .outline {
    color: var(--bg);
    -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--fg);
    text-stroke: 2px var(--fg);
  }

  .kinetic-letter {
    display: inline-block;
    transition: transform 0.15s ease;
    will-change: transform;
  }

  .hero-desc {
    max-width: 420px;
    margin-top: 48px;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .hero-cta {
    margin-top: 56px;
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 16px 48px;
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 700;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    border: 2px solid var(--fg);
  }
  .hero-cta:hover {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  /* DECORATIVE GRID */
  .grid-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    right: 80px;
    bottom: 80px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 60px);
    grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 60px);
    gap: 1px;
  }
  .grid-cell {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--bg);
    transition: background 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;
  }
  .grid-cell.active {
    background: var(--fg);
  }
  .grid-cell:hover {
    border-color: var(--fg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     VERTICAL TEXT ELEMENT
   ============================================ */
  .vertical-text {
    position: absolute;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  .vertical-text.left {
    left: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: rotate(-90deg);
    transform-origin: 0 0;
  }
  .vertical-text.right {
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
    transform-origin: 0 0;
  }

  /* ============================================
     STATEMENT SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .statement {
    padding: 160px 80px;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  .statement-text {
    font-size: clamp(32px, 6vw, 80px);
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1.05;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    max-width: 1000px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    mix-blend-mode: difference;
    color: inherit;
  }

  .statement-author {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-top: 64px;
  }

  .quote-marks {
    font-size: 120px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    left: 80px;
    color: var(--fg);
    opacity: 0.1;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  /* ============================================
     MARQUEE
   ============================================ */
  .marquee-section {
    padding: 40px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .marquee {
    display: flex;
    gap: 48px;
    animation: marquee 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes marquee {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  .marquee-item {
    font-size: 72px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    color: var(--border);
  }
  .marquee-item .dot {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    background: var(--fg);
    margin: 0 32px;
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  /* ============================================
     STATS
   ============================================ */
  .stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    background: var(--bg);
  }

  .stat {
    padding: 64px 48px;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
    text-align: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .stat:hover { background: var(--gray-700); }
  [data-theme="light"] .stat:hover { background: var(--gray-100); }

  .stat-value {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 56px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  /* ============================================
     SECTION COMMON
   ============================================ */
  .section {
    padding: 80px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .section-header {
    margin-bottom: 64px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 64px);
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
  }

  .section-count {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     MANIFESTO SECTION (NEW)
   ============================================ */
  .manifesto {
    padding: 160px 80px;
    position: relative;
  }

  .manifesto-content {
    max-width: 800px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 64px;
  }

  .manifesto-text {
    font-size: 18px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .manifesto-text p {
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .manifesto-text strong {
    color: var(--fg);
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .manifesto-rules {
    padding-top: 8px;
  }

  .manifesto-rule {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    padding: 16px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .manifesto-rule:hover {
    color: var(--fg);
    padding-left: 12px;
  }
  .manifesto-rule:first-child {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  /* ============================================
     FEATURES / PRINCIPLES
   ============================================ */
  .features {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .feature {
    padding: 48px;
    background: var(--bg);
    transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .feature::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: var(--fg);
    transform: translateY(100%);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    z-index: 0;
  }
  .feature:hover::before {
    transform: translateY(0%);
  }
  .feature:hover {
    color: var(--bg);
  }
  .feature > * {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .feature-number {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 72px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--border);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .feature:hover .feature-number {
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  .feature-title {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .feature-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    font-weight: 300;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .feature:hover .feature-desc {
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     HORIZONTAL WORK SCROLL (NEW)
   ============================================ */
  .work-horizontal {
    padding: 80px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .work-horizontal .section-header {
    padding: 0 80px;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .work-scroll-track {
    display: flex;
    gap: 32px;
    padding: 0 80px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    cursor: grab;
  }
  .work-scroll-track::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .work-scroll-track.dragging { cursor: grabbing; }

  .work-scroll-card {
    min-width: 500px;
    height: 400px;
    background: var(--bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 40px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
    scroll-snap-align: start;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .work-scroll-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--fg);
  }

  .work-card-pattern {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    opacity: 0.08;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .work-scroll-card:hover .work-card-pattern {
    opacity: 0.15;
  }

  .work-card-pattern.pattern-1 {
    background:
      repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px),
      repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px);
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-2 {
    background:
      repeating-conic-gradient(var(--fg) 0% 25%, transparent 25% 50%) 0 0 / 40px 40px;
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-3 {
    background:
      repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 16px);
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-4 {
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 10px 10px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 20px 20px;
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-5 {
    background:
      repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 20px),
      repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 40px);
  }

  .work-card-top {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .work-card-num {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 64px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--border);
    line-height: 1;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .work-scroll-card:hover .work-card-num {
    color: var(--fg);
    opacity: 0.3;
  }

  .work-card-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  .work-card-bottom h3 {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .work-card-bottom p {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .work-card-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 40px;
    bottom: 40px;
    font-size: 24px;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translate(-8px, 8px);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .work-scroll-card:hover .work-card-arrow {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate(0, 0);
  }

  /* ============================================
     WORK LIST (original grid, kept for reference)
   ============================================ */
  .work-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .work-item {
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    background: var(--bg);
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 32px;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    border: none;
    color: inherit;
    text-align: left;
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .work-item:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .work-preview {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 32px;
    bottom: 100px;
    overflow: hidden;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
  }
  .work-item:hover .work-preview { opacity: 1; }

  .work-preview-inner {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--gray-600);
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  [data-theme="light"] .work-preview-inner { background: var(--gray-100); }

  .work-preview-grid {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-size: 20px 20px;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(to right, var(--bg) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--bg) 1px, transparent 1px);
    opacity: 0.2;
  }

  .work-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .work-title {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
  }

  .work-tag {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-top: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .work-num {
    position: absolute;
    top: 32px;
    right: 32px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 64px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--border);
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .work-item:hover .work-num { color: var(--fg); }

  /* ============================================
     GALLERY
   ============================================ */
  .gallery {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .gallery-item {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    background: var(--bg);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .gallery-pattern {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-pattern { opacity: 0.3; }

  .gallery-item:nth-child(1) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 12px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(2) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 8px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(3) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-conic-gradient(var(--fg) 0% 25%, transparent 25% 50%) 0 0 / 30px 30px;
    opacity: 0.1;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(4) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 6px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }

  .gallery-label {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    background: var(--bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--fg);
    color: var(--fg);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-label {
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     TEAM SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .team-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .team-member {
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 40px 32px;
    text-align: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .team-member:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .team-portrait {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .portrait-placeholder {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--gray-700);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--fg);
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
  [data-theme="light"] .portrait-placeholder { background: var(--gray-100); opacity: 0.5; }
  .team-member:hover .portrait-placeholder { transform: scale(1.05); }

  .team-name {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .team-role {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  /* ============================================
     TIMELINE
   ============================================ */
  .timeline {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 80px;
  }

  .timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .timeline-item {
    position: relative;
    padding: 48px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .timeline-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .timeline-item::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: -84px;
    top: 56px;
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    background: var(--fg);
    transition: transform 0.2s;
  }
  .timeline-item:hover::before {
    transform: scale(1.5);
  }

  .timeline-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .timeline-title {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .timeline-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    line-height: 1.6;
    max-width: 600px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     CONTACT SECTION (NEW)
   ============================================ */
  #contact {
    padding: 80px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .contact-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    margin-top: 48px;
  }

  .contact-info {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 32px;
  }

  .contact-info-item h4 {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .contact-info-item a,
  .contact-info-item p {
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 16px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .contact-info-item a:hover {
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  .contact-form {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .form-group {
    position: relative;
  }

  .form-group label {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .form-group input,
  .form-group textarea {
    width: 100%;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--fg);
    padding: 14px 16px;
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
    outline: none;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .form-group input:focus,
  .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--fg);
  }

  .form-group textarea {
    resize: vertical;
    min-height: 120px;
  }

  .form-submit {
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: 14px 40px;
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
    border: 2px solid var(--fg);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .form-submit:hover {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  .form-success {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .form-success.visible {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  /* ============================================
     PROJECT MODAL (NEW)
   ============================================ */
  .modal-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
    z-index: 5000;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
    transition: opacity 0.4s, visibility 0.4s;
  }
  .modal-overlay.active {
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible;
  }

  .modal-content {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    max-width: 800px;
    width: 90%;
    max-height: 80vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    position: relative;
    transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.97);
    transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
  }
  .modal-overlay.active .modal-content {
    transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
  }

  .modal-close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--fg);
    font-size: 18px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .modal-close:hover {
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  .modal-header {
    padding: 48px 48px 32px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .modal-header-meta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .modal-header-meta span {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  .modal-header h2 {
    font-size: 36px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
  }

  .modal-preview {
    height: 200px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .modal-body {
    padding: 32px 48px 48px;
  }

  .modal-body p {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .modal-body ul {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }

  .modal-body ul li {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     FOOTER
   ============================================ */
  .footer-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 64px;
  }

  .footer-brand {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 24px;
    letter-spacing: 8px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .footer-copy {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .footer-col-title {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .footer-links {
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .footer-links a {
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--fg); }

  /* ============================================
     SMOOTH SCROLL CONTAINER
   ============================================ */
  .smooth-wrapper {
    will-change: transform;
  }

  /* ============================================
     RESPONSIVE
   ============================================ */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero { padding: 120px 24px; }

    nav { padding: 16px 24px; }
    .cursor-main, .cursor-follower { display: none; }

<!-- MANIFESTO SECTION (NEW) -->
<section class="manifesto" id="manifesto" aria-label="Manifesto">
  <div class="section-header reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">About</div>
      <div class="section-title">The Void Approach</div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-count">001</div>
  </div>
  <div class="manifesto-content">
    <div class="manifesto-text reveal">
      <p>Every design begins with a <strong>lie</strong> — the lie that more is better, that complexity equals sophistication, that every pixel must earn its place by being <em>seen</em>.</p>
      <p>We start from the opposite premise. The most powerful design is the one you <strong>can't reduce further</strong> without it ceasing to be itself. That threshold — the edge before collapse — is where we work.</p>
      <p>Our practice is one of <strong>systematic removal</strong>. Not decoration. Not expression. Reduction as method, restraint as discipline, absence as form.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="manifesto-rules reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Embrace emptiness</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Remove before adding</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Monochrome reveals</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Systems over gestures</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Sharp communicates more</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Subtract until truth</span> <span>→</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PRINCIPLES / FEATURES -->
<section class="section" id="principles" aria-label="Design principles">
  <div class="section-header reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Principles</div>
      <div class="section-count">III — 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="features">
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="feature-number">I</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Embrace Void</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Empty space is not absence — it is the most potent form of presence. Use it to create weight, hierarchy, and intention.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="feature-number">II</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Sharp Truth</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Rounded edges soften the message. Sharp geometry cuts through noise and communicates with unfiltered directness.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="feature-number">III</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Monochrome</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Color distracts. Black and white reveal structure. Strip away hue and what remains is pure form and function.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="feature-number">IV</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">System</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Design is not decoration — it is a system of decisions. Every margin, every weight, every rhythm serves the whole.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="feature-number">V</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Timeless</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Trends age. Structure endures. We build systems that survive the death of the moment they were born in.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="feature-number">VI</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Less</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">If you can remove it, you should. The goal is not completion but reduction — to the point where no more can be taken.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
