  .work-card-pattern.pattern-1 {
    background:
      repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px),
      repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px);
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-2 {
    background:
      repeating-conic-gradient(var(--fg) 0% 25%, transparent 25% 50%) 0 0 / 40px 40px;
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-3 {
    background:
      repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 16px);
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-4 {
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 10px 10px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px) 0 0 / 20px 20px;
  }
  .work-card-pattern.pattern-5 {
    background:
      repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 20px),
      repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 40px);
  }

  .work-card-top {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .work-card-num {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 64px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--border);
    line-height: 1;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .work-scroll-card:hover .work-card-num {
    color: var(--fg);
    opacity: 0.3;
  }

  .work-card-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  }

  .work-card-bottom h3 {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .work-card-bottom p {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .work-card-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 40px;
    bottom: 40px;
    font-size: 24px;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translate(-8px, 8px);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .work-scroll-card:hover .work-card-arrow {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate(0, 0);
  }

  /* ============================================
     WORK LIST (original grid, kept for reference)
   ============================================ */
  .work-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .work-item {
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    background: var(--bg);
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    padding: 32px;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    border: none;
    color: inherit;
    text-align: left;
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .work-item:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .work-preview {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 32px;
    bottom: 100px;
    overflow: hidden;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
  }
  .work-item:hover .work-preview { opacity: 1; }

  .work-preview-inner {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--gray-600);
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  [data-theme="light"] .work-preview-inner { background: var(--gray-100); }

  .work-preview-grid {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-size: 20px 20px;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(to right, var(--bg) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--bg) 1px, transparent 1px);
    opacity: 0.2;
  }

  .work-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .work-title {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
  }

  .work-tag {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-top: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .work-num {
    position: absolute;
    top: 32px;
    right: 32px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 64px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--border);
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .work-item:hover .work-num { color: var(--fg); }

  /* ============================================
     GALLERY
   ============================================ */
  .gallery {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .gallery-item {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    background: var(--bg);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .gallery-pattern {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-pattern { opacity: 0.3; }

  .gallery-item:nth-child(1) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 12px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(2) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 8px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(3) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-conic-gradient(var(--fg) 0% 25%, transparent 25% 50%) 0 0 / 30px 30px;
    opacity: 0.1;
  }
  .gallery-item:nth-child(4) .gallery-pattern {
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--fg) 0px, var(--fg) 2px, transparent 2px, transparent 6px);
    opacity: 0.15;
  }

  .gallery-label {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    background: var(--bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--fg);
    color: var(--fg);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-label {
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  /* ============================================
     TEAM SECTION
   ============================================ */
  .team-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .team-member {
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 40px 32px;
    text-align: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .team-member:hover { background: var(--gray-600); }

  .team-portrait {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .portrait-placeholder {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--gray-700);
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--fg);
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
  [data-theme="light"] .portrait-placeholder { background: var(--gray-100); opacity: 0.5; }
  .team-member:hover .portrait-placeholder { transform: scale(1.05); }

  .team-name {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .team-role {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  /* ============================================
     TIMELINE
   ============================================ */
  .timeline {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 80px;
  }

  .timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
  }

  .timeline-item {
    position: relative;
    padding: 48px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .timeline-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .timeline-item::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: -84px;
    top: 56px;
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    background: var(--fg);
    transition: transform 0.2s;
  }
  .timeline-item:hover::before {
    transform: scale(1.5);
  }

  .timeline-year {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .timeline-title {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .timeline-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    line-height: 1.6;
    max-width: 600px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     CONTACT SECTION (NEW)
   ============================================ */
  #contact {
    padding: 80px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .contact-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    margin-top: 48px;
  }

  .contact-info {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 32px;
  }

  .contact-info-item h4 {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .contact-info-item a,
  .contact-info-item p {
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 16px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .contact-info-item a:hover {
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  .contact-form {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .form-group {
    position: relative;
  }

  .form-group label {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .form-group input,
  .form-group textarea {
    width: 100%;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--fg);
    padding: 14px 16px;
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
    outline: none;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .form-group input:focus,
  .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--fg);
  }

  .form-group textarea {
    resize: vertical;
    min-height: 120px;
  }

  .form-submit {
    align-self: flex-start;
    padding: 14px 40px;
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
    border: 2px solid var(--fg);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .form-submit:hover {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
  }

  .form-success {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .form-success.visible {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  /* ============================================
     PROJECT MODAL (NEW)
   ============================================ */
  .modal-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
    z-index: 5000;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
    transition: opacity 0.4s, visibility 0.4s;
  }
  .modal-overlay.active {
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible;
  }

  .modal-content {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    max-width: 800px;
    width: 90%;
    max-height: 80vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    position: relative;
    transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.97);
    transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
  }
  .modal-overlay.active .modal-content {
    transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
  }

  .modal-close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--fg);
    font-size: 18px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .modal-close:hover {
    background: var(--fg);
    color: var(--bg);
  }

  .modal-header {
    padding: 48px 48px 32px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .modal-header-meta {
    display: flex;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .modal-header-meta span {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
  }

  .modal-header h2 {
    font-size: 36px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
  }

  .modal-preview {
    height: 200px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .modal-body {
    padding: 32px 48px 48px;
  }

  .modal-body p {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .modal-body ul {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }

  .modal-body ul li {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }

  /* ============================================
     FOOTER
   ============================================ */
  .footer-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 64px;
  }

  .footer-brand {
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 24px;
    letter-spacing: 8px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .footer-copy {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .footer-col-title {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--fg-muted);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .footer-links {
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .footer-links a {
    color: var(--fg-dim);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--fg); }

  /* ============================================
     SMOOTH SCROLL CONTAINER
   ============================================ */
  .smooth-wrapper {
    will-change: transform;
  }

  /* ============================================
     RESPONSIVE
   ============================================ */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero { padding: 120px 24px; }
    .section { padding: 64px 24px; }
    .manifesto { padding: 80px 24px; }
    .manifesto-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .features { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .gallery { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .work-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .team-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
    #contact { padding: 48px 24px; }
    nav { padding: 16px 24px; }
    .cursor-main, .cursor-follower { display: none; }
    body { cursor: auto; }
    .statement { padding: 80px 24px; }
    .statement-text { font-size: 36px; }
    .work-scroll-card { min-width: 320px; height: 320px; }
    .work-horizontal .section-header { padding: 0 24px; }
    .work-scroll-track { padding: 0 24px; }
    .modal-header { padding: 32px 24px 24px; }
    .modal-body { padding: 24px; }
    .modal-body ul { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- LOADING SCREEN -->
<div class="loader" id="loader" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="loader-logo">VOID</div>
  <div class="loader-count" id="loaderCount">0%</div>
  <div class="loader-bar">
    <div class="loader-bar-fill" id="loaderBar"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="loader-tagline">Subtract until only truth remains</div>
</div>

<!-- Custom cursors -->
<div class="cursor-main" id="cursorMain" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="cursor-follower" id="cursorFollower" aria-hidden="true"></div>

<!-- Grain overlay -->
<div class="grain-overlay" id="grainOverlay" aria-hidden="true">
  <canvas id="grainCanvas"></canvas>
</div>
<div class="scanlines" id="scanlines" aria-hidden="true"></div>

<!-- Page transition -->
<div class="page-transition" id="pageTransition" aria-hidden="true"></div>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="projectModal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-content">
    <button class="modal-close" id="modalClose" aria-label="Close project details">×</button>
    <div class="modal-header">
      <div class="modal-header-meta">
        <span id="modalYear"></span>
        <span id="modalTag"></span>
      </div>
      <h2 id="modalTitle"></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-preview">
      <div class="work-card-pattern" id="modalPattern"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <p id="modalDesc"></p>
      <p id="modalDesc2"></p>
      <ul id="modalDetails"></ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav role="navigation" aria-label="Main navigation">
  <a href="#" class="logo magnetic-target" aria-label="VOID — Back to top">VOID</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#manifesto">Manifesto</a></li>
    <li><a href="#work">Work</a></li>
    <li><a href="#principles">Principles</a></li>
    <li><a href="#team">Team</a></li>
    <li><a href="#history">History</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-right">
    <button class="theme-toggle magnetic-target" id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle dark/light theme">Light</button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- Main content wrapper -->
<main class="smooth-wrapper" id="smoothWrapper">

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" aria-label="Hero">
  <div class="vertical-text left" aria-hidden="true">Design Collective</div>
  <div class="vertical-text right" aria-hidden="true">Est. 2024</div>

  <div class="hero-tag reveal">Est. 2024</div>
  <div class="hero-title-wrap reveal" id="heroTitleWrap">
    <h1 class="hero-title" id="heroTitle">
      Define<br>
      Your<br>
      <span class="outline">Void</span>
    </h1>
  </div>
  <p class="hero-desc reveal reveal-delay-1">
    We are a design collective operating at the intersection of art and technology. We believe in the power of constraint — that emptiness has weight, and silence has shape.
  </p>
  <a href="#work" class="hero-cta magnetic-target reveal reveal-delay-2">Enter The Void</a>

  <div class="grid-overlay reveal reveal-delay-3" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="grid-cell"></div><div class="grid-cell active"></div><div class="grid-cell"></div><div class="grid-cell active"></div>
    <div class="grid-cell active"></div><div class="grid-cell"></div><div class="grid-cell active"></div><div class="grid-cell"></div>
    <div class="grid-cell"></div><div class="grid-cell active"></div><div class="grid-cell"></div><div class="grid-cell active"></div>
    <div class="grid-cell active"></div><div class="grid-cell"></div><div class="grid-cell active"></div><div class="grid-cell"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATEMENT -->
<section class="statement" aria-label="Statement">
  <div class="quote-marks reveal-left" aria-hidden="true">"</div>
  <p class="statement-text reveal">
    We do not add. We subtract — until only truth remains.
  </p>
  <p class="statement-author reveal reveal-delay-2">VOID MANIFESTO</p>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<section class="marquee-section" aria-label="Keywords">
  <div class="marquee" aria-hidden="true">
    <span class="marquee-item">Design<span class="dot"></span>Subtract<span class="dot"></span>Refine<span class="dot"></span>Reduce<span class="dot"></span>Distill<span class="dot"></span>Essence</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Design<span class="dot"></span>Subtract<span class="dot"></span>Refine<span class="dot"></span>Reduce<span class="dot"></span>Distill<span class="dot"></span>Essence</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="stats" role="list" aria-label="Statistics">
  <div class="stat reveal reveal-delay-1" role="listitem">
    <div class="stat-value" data-count="47">00</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Projects</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat reveal reveal-delay-2" role="listitem">
    <div class="stat-value" data-count="3">00</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Awards</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat reveal reveal-delay-3" role="listitem">
    <div class="stat-value" data-count="12">00</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Members</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat reveal reveal-delay-4" style="border-right: none;" role="listitem">
    <div class="stat-value">99%</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Reduction</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MANIFESTO SECTION (NEW) -->
<section class="manifesto" id="manifesto" aria-label="Manifesto">
  <div class="section-header reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">About</div>
      <div class="section-title">The Void Approach</div>
    </div>
    <div class="section-count">001</div>
  </div>
  <div class="manifesto-content">
    <div class="manifesto-text reveal">
      <p>Every design begins with a <strong>lie</strong> — the lie that more is better, that complexity equals sophistication, that every pixel must earn its place by being <em>seen</em>.</p>
      <p>We start from the opposite premise. The most powerful design is the one you <strong>can't reduce further</strong> without it ceasing to be itself. That threshold — the edge before collapse — is where we work.</p>
      <p>Our practice is one of <strong>systematic removal</strong>. Not decoration. Not expression. Reduction as method, restraint as discipline, absence as form.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="manifesto-rules reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Embrace emptiness</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Remove before adding</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Monochrome reveals</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Systems over gestures</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Sharp communicates more</span> <span>→</span></div>
      <div class="manifesto-rule"><span>Subtract until truth</span> <span>→</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PRINCIPLES / FEATURES -->
<section class="section" id="principles" aria-label="Design principles">
  <div class="section-header reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Principles</div>
      <div class="section-count">III — 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="features">
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="feature-number">I</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Embrace Void</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Empty space is not absence — it is the most potent form of presence. Use it to create weight, hierarchy, and intention.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="feature-number">II</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Sharp Truth</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Rounded edges soften the message. Sharp geometry cuts through noise and communicates with unfiltered directness.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="feature-number">III</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Monochrome</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Color distracts. Black and white reveal structure. Strip away hue and what remains is pure form and function.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="feature-number">IV</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">System</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Design is not decoration — it is a system of decisions. Every margin, every weight, every rhythm serves the whole.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="feature-number">V</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Timeless</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">Trends age. Structure endures. We build systems that survive the death of the moment they were born in.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="feature-number">VI</div>
      <h3 class="feature-title">Less</h3>
      <p class="feature-desc">If you can remove it, you should. The goal is not completion but reduction — to the point where no more can be taken.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
(function() {
  'use strict';

  /* =========================================
     LOADING SCREEN
   ========================================= */
  const loader = document.getElementById('loader');
  const loaderCount = document.getElementById('loaderCount');
  const loaderBar = document.getElementById('loaderBar');

  function runLoader() {
    let progress = 0;
    const target = 100;
    const duration = 2000;
    const startTime = performance.now();

    function animate(now) {
      const elapsed = now - startTime;
      const rawProgress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      // Ease out quart
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - rawProgress, 4);
      progress = Math.floor(eased * target);
      loaderCount.textContent = progress + '%';
      loaderBar.style.width = progress + '%';

      if (rawProgress < 1) {
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
      } else {
        // Reveal page
        setTimeout(function() {
          loader.classList.add('done');
          // Trigger reveal of hero elements
          setTimeout(checkReveals, 300);
        }, 400);
      }
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  }

  // Short delay then start loader
  setTimeout(runLoader, 200);

  /* =========================================
     THEME PERSISTENCE (localStorage)
   ========================================= */
  const htmlEl = document.documentElement;
  const themeToggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
  const scanlines = document.getElementById('scanlines');

  // Restore saved theme
  const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('void-theme');
  if (savedTheme) {
    htmlEl.setAttribute('data-theme', savedTheme);
    if (savedTheme === 'light') {
      themeToggle.textContent = 'Dark';
      scanlines.classList.add('visible');
    } else {
      themeToggle.textContent = 'Light';
    }
  }

  themeToggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    initAudio();
    const isDark = htmlEl.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark';
    const newTheme = isDark ? 'light' : 'dark';
    htmlEl.setAttribute('data-theme', newTheme);
    themeToggle.textContent = newTheme === 'dark' ? 'Light' : 'Dark';
    scanlines.classList.toggle('visible', !isDark);
    localStorage.setItem('void-theme', newTheme);
  });

  /* =========================================
     CUSTOM CURSOR + MAGNETIC EFFECT
   ========================================= */
  const cursorMain = document.getElementById('cursorMain');
  const cursorFollower = document.getElementById('cursorFollower');
  let mouseX = -100, mouseY = -100;
  let followerX = -100, followerY = -100;
  let isDragging = false;

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    mouseX = e.clientX;
    mouseY = e.clientY;
    cursorMain.style.left = mouseX + 'px';
    cursorMain.style.top = mouseY + 'px';
  });

  function updateCursor() {
    followerX += (mouseX - followerX) * 0.12;
    followerY += (mouseY - followerY) * 0.12;
    cursorFollower.style.left = followerX + 'px';
    cursorFollower.style.top = followerY + 'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(updateCursor);
  }
  updateCursor();

  // Magnetic targets
  const magneticTargets = document.querySelectorAll('.magnetic-target');
  magneticTargets.forEach(function(target) {
    target.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
      cursorMain.classList.add('hovering');
      cursorFollower.classList.add('hovering');
    });
    target.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
      cursorMain.classList.remove('hovering');
      cursorFollower.classList.remove('hovering');
      // Reset magnetic position
      target.style.transform = '';
      target.style.transition = 'transform 0.3s ease';
    });
    target.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
      const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;
      target.style.transform = 'translate(' + (x * 0.15) + 'px, ' + (y * 0.15) + 'px)';
      target.style.transition = 'none';
    });
  });

  // Hover elements for cursor
  const hoverTargetss = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, .feature, .work-item, .gallery-item, .team-member, .timeline-item, .work-scroll-card');
  hoverTargets.forEach(function(el) {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
      cursorMain.classList.add('hovering');
      cursorFollower.classList.add('hovering');
    });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
      cursorMain.classList.remove('hovering');
      cursorFollower.classList.remove('hovering');
    });
  });

  /* =========================================
     GRAIN NOISE SYSTEM (optimized)
   ========================================= */
  const grainCanvas = document.getElementById('grainCanvas');
  const grainCtx = grainCanvas.getContext('2d');
  // Small canvas — scaled up via CSS (massive performance win)
  const grainSize = 128;
  grainCanvas.width = grainSize;
  grainCanvas.height = grainSize;
  grainCanvas.style.width = '100%';
  grainCanvas.style.height = '100%';
  grainCanvas.style.imageRendering = 'pixelated';

  let grainFrame = 0;
  function drawGrain() {
    const imageData = grainCtx.createImageData(grainSize, grainSize);
    const data = imageData.data;
    // Draw grain at 30fps instead of 60fps
    grainFrame++;
    if (grainFrame % 2 === 0) {
      for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {
        const v = Math.random() * 255;
        data[i] = v;
        data[i + 1] = v;
        data[i + 2] = v;
        data[i + 3] = 255;
      }
      grainCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(drawGrain);
  }
  drawGrain();

  /* =========================================
     AUDIO SYSTEM
   ========================================= */
  let audioCtx = null;
  let soundEnabled = false;

  function initAudio() {
    if (audioCtx) return;
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    soundEnabled = true;
  }

  function playHoverSound() {
    if (!audioCtx || !soundEnabled) return;
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc.frequency.value = 200 + Math.random() * 100;
    osc.type = 'sine';
    gain.gain.value = 0.02;
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
  }

  function playClickSound() {
    if (!audioCtx || !soundEnabled) return;
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc.frequency.value = 800;
    osc.type = 'square';
    gain.gain.value = 0.03;
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (!audioCtx) { initAudio(); }
    playClickSound();
  });

  hoverTargets.forEach(function(el) {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', playHoverSound);
  });

  /* =========================================
     SCROLL REVEAL (IntersectionObserver)
   ========================================= */
  const revealElements = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-scale');

  const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
    entries.forEach(function(entry) {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('revealed');
        revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.15, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' });

  revealElements.forEach(function(el) {
    revealObserver.observe(el);
  });

  /* =========================================
     COUNTING ANIMATION
   ========================================= */
  const countElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-count]');
  let counted = false;

  const countObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
    entries.forEach(function(entry) {
      if (entry.isIntersecting && !counted) {
        counted = true;
        countElements.forEach(function(el) {
          const target = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-count'));
          const duration = 2000;
          const startTime = performance.now();

          function animateCount(now) {
            const elapsed = now - startTime;
            const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
            const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
            const current = Math.floor(eased * target);
            el.textContent = String(current).padStart(2, '0');
            if (progress < 1) {
              requestAnimationFrame(animateCount);
            } else {
              el.textContent = String(target).padStart(2, '0');
            }
          }
          requestAnimationFrame(animateCount);
        });
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.5 });

  countElements.forEach(function(el) { countObserver.observe(el); });

  /* =========================================
     HERO PARALLAX
   ========================================= */
  const heroTitle = document.getElementById('heroTitle');
  const heroSection = document.querySelector('.hero');

  heroSection.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    const rect = heroSection.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
    const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
    heroTitle.style.transform = 'translate(' + (x * -8) + 'px, ' + (y * -8) + 'px)';
  });

  heroSection.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
    heroTitle.style.transform = 'translate(0, 0)';
    heroTitle.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease';
    setTimeout(function() {
      heroTitle.style.transition = 'none';
    }, 500);
  });

  /* =========================================
     PAGE TRANSITION (clip-path circle)
   ========================================= */
  const pageTransition = document.getElementById('pageTransition');

  function triggerPageTransition(e, callback) {
    const cx = (e ? e.clientX : window.innerWidth / 2) / window.innerWidth * 100;
    const cy = (e ? e.clientY : window.innerHeight / 2) / window.innerHeight * 100;
    pageTransition.style.setProperty('--cx', cx + '%');
    pageTransition.style.setProperty('--cy', cy + '%');

    requestAnimationFrame(function() {
      pageTransition.classList.add('wiping');
      if (typeof callback === 'function') {
        setTimeout(callback, 350);
      }
      setTimeout(function() {
        pageTransition.classList.remove('wiping');
      }, 700);
    });
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(function(link) {
    link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        triggerPageTransition(e, function() {
          target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'auto' });
        });
      }
    });
  });

  /* =========================================
     SMOOTH SCROLL (inertia-based)
   ========================================= */
  let smoothScrollTarget = 0;
  let smoothScrollCurrent = 0;
  let smoothScrollActive = false;
  const ease = 0.075;

  function smoothScrollStep() {
    smoothScrollCurrent += (smoothScrollTarget - smoothScrollCurrent) * ease;

    if (Math.abs(smoothScrollTarget - smoothScrollCurrent) < 0.5) {
      smoothScrollCurrent = smoothScrollTarget;
      smoothScrollActive = false;
    }

    window.scrollTo(0, smoothScrollCurrent);
    if (smoothScrollActive) {
      requestAnimationFrame(smoothScrollStep);
    }
  }

  // Intercept anchor-based scrolling for smooth feel
  const originalScrollTo = window.scrollTo;
  let nativeScrollMode = false;

  // We use native smooth scroll behavior for nav links via the page transition
  // For general smooth scroll, we override wheel
  let lastWheelTime = 0;
  window.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
    // Only apply smooth scroll on non-touch devices
    if (navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0) return;

    e.preventDefault();
    smoothScrollTarget += e.deltaY;
    smoothScrollTarget = Math.max(0, Math.min(smoothScrollTarget, document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight));

    if (!smoothScrollActive) {
      smoothScrollActive = true;
      smoothScrollTarget = smoothScrollCurrent + e.deltaY;
      smoothScrollTarget = Math.max(0, Math.min(smoothScrollTarget, document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight));
      requestAnimationFrame(smoothScrollStep);
    }
  }, { passive: false });

  // Update current scroll position for smooth scroll
  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    if (!smoothScrollActive) {
      smoothScrollCurrent = window.pageYOffset;
    }
  });

  /* =========================================
     HORIZONTAL DRAG SCROLL (Work section)
   ========================================= */
  const workTrack = document.getElementById('workScrollTrack');
  let isDown = false;
  let startX;
  let scrollLeft;

  workTrack.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    isDown = true;
    workTrack.classList.add('dragging');
    startX = e.pageX - workTrack.offsetLeft;
    scrollLeft = workTrack.scrollLeft;
  });

  workTrack.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
    isDown = false;
    workTrack.classList.remove('dragging');
  });

  workTrack.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
    isDown = false;
    workTrack.classList.remove('dragging');
  });

  workTrack.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!isDown) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    const x = e.pageX - workTrack.offsetLeft;
    const walk = (x - startX) * 1.5;
    workTrack.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
  });

  /* =========================================
     GRID CELL ANIMATION
   ========================================= */
  const gridCells = document.querySelectorAll('.grid-cell');
  setInterval(function() {
    const randomCell = gridCells[Math.floor(Math.random() * gridCells.length)];
    randomCell.classList.toggle('active');
  }, 2000);

  /* =========================================
     SCROLL PARALLAX
   ========================================= */
  const quoteMarks = document.querySelector('.quote-marks');
  const gridOverlay = document.querySelector('.grid-overlay');

  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    const scrollY = window.pageYOffset;
    if (quoteMarks) {
      quoteMarks.style.transform = 'translateY(' + (scrollY * 0.3) + 'px)';
    }
    if (gridOverlay) {
      gridOverlay.style.transform = 'translateY(' + (scrollY * -0.1) + 'px)';
    }
  });

  /* =========================================
     PROJECT MODAL
   ========================================= */
  const projects = [
    {
      title: 'Black Mirror',
      year: '2024',
      tag: 'Identity System',
      patternClass: 'pattern-1',
      desc: 'A complete identity system developed for a gallery exhibition exploring the relationship between technology and human perception. 47 iterations, zero color, one principle: subtract until truth remains.',
      desc2: 'The system encompasses logo, wayfinding, printed matter, and digital assets — all governed by a strict geometric vocabulary derived from the single gesture of subtraction.',
      details: ['47 iterations', '0 colors used', '120+ touchpoints', 'Gallery exhibition', 'Print & digital', 'Wayfinding system']
    },
    {
      title: 'Silent Archive',
      year: '2023',
      tag: 'Digital Platform',
      patternClass: 'pattern-2',
      desc: 'A digital platform for archiving and presenting monochrome design work. The interface itself is an exercise in restraint — no ornament, no decoration, pure structure.',
      desc2: 'Built as a research tool for design historians, the platform catalogs over 2,000 works spanning six decades of monochrome practice, each entry reduced to its essential metadata.',
      details: ['2,000+ entries', '6 decades covered', 'Search & filter', 'Responsive design', 'Design research', 'Open archive']
    },
    {
      title: 'Zero One',
      year: '2022',
      tag: 'Brand System',
      patternClass: 'pattern-3',
      desc: 'A limited-edition monotype catalog exploring the binary nature of design — presence and absence, black and white, something and nothing.',
      desc2: 'Sold out in 72 hours and collected by design archives in three countries, Zero One became the most visible expression of the VOID approach.',
      details: ['Limited edition', 'Sold out in 72h', '3 countries', 'Monotype prints', '48 pages', 'Archive collected']
    },
    {
      title: 'Form & Field',
      year: '2021',
      tag: 'Exhibition Design',
      patternClass: 'pattern-4',
      desc: 'Spatial design for a two-week exhibition in Berlin. The gallery was transformed into a field of geometric interventions — lines, grids, and voids inscribed directly onto walls, floor, and ceiling.',
      desc2: 'Visitors moved through a sequence of spatial experiences, each one defined not by what was present but by what had been removed. The exhibition catalog sold out on opening night.',
      details: ['Berlin gallery', '2 weeks', '500m² space', 'Spatial design', 'Catalog sold out', 'Geometric interventions']
    },
    {
      title: 'Negative Space',
      year: '2020',
      tag: 'Editorial Design',
      patternClass: 'pattern-5',
      desc: 'An editorial design system for a quarterly publication dedicated to the study of negative space in contemporary design. Every spread treats emptiness as the primary design material.',
      desc2: 'The publication itself is a manifesto-in-print — 200 pages of intentional silence, white space used as aggressively as any typographic gesture.',
      details: ['Quarterly', '200 pages', 'Editorial system', 'Typography-led', 'Print only', 'Design research']
    }
  ];

  const modalOverlay = document.getElementById('projectModal');
  const modalClose = document.getElementById('modalClose');
  const modalTitle = document.getElementById('modalTitle');
  const modalYear = document.getElementById('modalYear');
  const modalTag = document.getElementById('modalTag');
  const modalPattern = document.getElementById('modalPattern');
  const modalDesc = document.getElementById('modalDesc');
  const modalDesc2 = document.getElementById('modalDesc2');
  const modalDetails = document.getElementById('modalDetails');

  function openModal(index) {
    const p = projects[index];
    if (!p) return;
    modalTitle.textContent = p.title;
    modalYear.textContent = p.year;
    modalTag.textContent = p.tag;
    modalPattern.className = 'work-card-pattern ' + p.patternClass;
    modalDesc.textContent = p.desc;
    modalDesc2.textContent = p.desc2;
    modalDetails.innerHTML = '';
    p.details.forEach(function(d) {
      const li = document.createElement('li');
      li.textContent = d;
      modalDetails.appendChild(li);
    });
    modalOverlay.classList.add('active');
    modalOverlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    modalClose.focus();
  }

  function closeModal() {
    modalOverlay.classList.remove('active');
    modalOverlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  // Work scroll cards open modal
  document.querySelectorAll('.work-scroll-card').forEach(function(card) {
    card.addEventListener('click', function() {
      openModal(parseInt(card.dataset.project));
    });
  });

  // Original work grid items open modal
  const originalWorkItems = document.querySelectorAll('.work-item');
  originalWorkItems.forEach(function(item, i) {
    item.addEventListener('click', function() {
      openModal(i);
    });
  });

  modalClose.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
  modalOverlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (e.target === modalOverlay) closeModal();
  });

  // Escape key closes modal
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal();
  });

  /* =========================================
     CONTACT FORM
   ========================================= */
  const contactForm = document.getElementById('contactForm');
  const formSuccess = document.getElementById('formSuccess');

  contactForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    // Simulate submission
    const name = document.getElementById('contactName').value;
    const email = document.getElementById('contactEmail').value;
    const message = document.getElementById('contactMessage').value;

    // Basic validation
    if (!name || !email || !message) return;

    // Show success
    formSuccess.classList.add('visible');
    contactForm.reset();

    setTimeout(function() {
      formSuccess.classList.remove('visible');
    }, 4000);
  });

})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

    III — 06
    I

    Embrace Void

    Empty space is not absence — it is the most potent form of presence. Use it to create weight, hierarchy, and intention.

    II

    Sharp Truth

    Rounded edges soften the message. Sharp geometry cuts through noise and communicates with unfiltered directness.

    III

    Monochrome

    Color distracts. Black and white reveal structure. Strip away hue and what remains is pure form and function.

    IV

    System

    Design is not decoration — it is a system of decisions. Every margin, every weight, every rhythm serves the whole.

    V

    Timeless

    Trends age. Structure endures. We build systems that survive the death of the moment they were born in.

    VI

    Less

    If you can remove it, you should. The goal is not completion but reduction — to the point where no more can be taken.

    Selected Work
    2019 — 2024
    About
    The Void Approach
    001

    Every design begins with a lie — the lie that more is better, that complexity equals sophistication, that every pixel must earn its place by being seen.

    We start from the opposite premise. The most powerful design is the one you can't reduce further without it ceasing to be itself. That threshold — the edge before collapse — is where we work.

    Our practice is one of systematic removal. Not decoration. Not expression. Reduction as method, restraint as discipline, absence as form.
